entities.name: ASPERGILLUS FLAVUS
entities.description: A fungus collected from groundnut fields and assessed for sclerotia and aflatoxin production

entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: The crop from whose fields the fungal isolates were collected

entities.name: SOIL TYPE
entities.description: The environmental variable used to categorize the fields from which isolates were collected

entities.name: SCLEROTIA PRODUCTION
entities.description: The capacity of A. flavus isolates to produce sclerotia

entities.name: AFLATOXIN PRODUCTION
entities.description: The capacity of A. flavus isolates to produce aflatoxins

entities.name: AFLATOXIN B
entities.description: The specific type of aflatoxin produced by the isolates

entities.name: VERTISOL
entities.description: A specific soil type associated with lower aflatoxin production

entities.name: RED SANDY LOAM
entities.description: A specific soil type associated with higher aflatoxin production compared to vertisols

entities.name: LIGHT SANDY
entities.description: A specific soil type associated with higher aflatoxin production compared to vertisols

entities.name: SINGLE SPORE ISOLATION
entities.description: The technique used to obtain pure isolates of A. flavus

relationships.description: results in higher production than vertisol
